description: You are a robotics integration engineer preparing a Webots industrial robot arm inspection workcell simulation. Reconfigure the simulation to match hardware specifications by setting the 'INSPECTION_ARM' Robot translation to (1.5, 0.5, 0), the 'inspection_camera' width to 1920 and height to 1080, and the camera fieldOfView to 0.5236 radians. Additionally, set the 'shoulder_motor' RotationalMotor maxVelocity to 1.0 rad/s and the WorldInfo basicTimeStep to 8 ms. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/inspection_workcell.wbt.
